payload.title: Resolve scoped role aliases to unique active admitted identities
payload.summary: Narada should distinguish exact operator-surface identity addresses from scoped role aliases. A message or task addressed to narada-andrey.Kevin should resolve exactly to that identity. A message addressed to narada-andrey.architect should resolve to the unique active admitted identity in the narada-andrey Site with role architect; today that should find narada-andrey.Kevin because Kevin is the only architect. If zero or multiple identities match, resolution must fail explicitly rather than guessing.
doctrine: Role aliases are addressable loci, not identities.
Requested address and resolved identity must both be preserved in envelopes and lifecycle records.
Resolution must be deterministic and auditable: exact_identity, unique_role_alias, role_alias_unresolved, or role_alias_ambiguous.
Ambiguity should list candidate identities and require explicit operator/sender choice or an admitted routing policy.

proposed_shape.exact_identity: narada-andrey.Kevin resolves only to identity narada-andrey.Kevin.
proposed_shape.unique_role_alias: narada-andrey.architect resolves to the unique active admitted architect identity in narada-andrey.
proposed_shape.multiple_matches: Fail as role_alias_ambiguous and list candidates.
